conflicts.description: The previous sheet ended Elise's visible recovery in chapter 17, but the manuscript still describes her left-side wound as half-healed when she leaves Paris.
conflicts.canonical_value: Elise remains visibly wounded through chapter 18 and leaves Paris still healing.
conflicts.resolution_note: The final chapter is the latest on-page state and twice locates her copied papers against a half-healed wound.

conflicts.description: The previous sheet implied Lucien's notebook was only copied before Elise disappeared, but the manuscript shows Elise still carrying Lucien's original notebook when she leaves Paris.
conflicts.canonical_value: Elise leaves Paris with Lucien's notebook itself after using it to publish corrected names.
conflicts.resolution_note: Chapter 17 transfers the notebook to Elise, and chapter 18 keeps the wrapped notebook physically with her through departure.
